历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 7362 → 7874 → 6929 → 7584 → 8582, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The 2025 baseline is approximately 8582, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1000 positions over the past two years. From 2021 to 2025, the provincial enrollment plans for Physics Category were 99 → 103 → 102 → 105 → 107, increasing slightly year by year. The 2026 plan is 121 students, an expansion of about 13.1% compared to 2025, which is significant, but the increase in the number of examinees is even larger.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 31st in 2026, with a stable range of 29–32 in recent years, belonging to the core 985 tier. The university has no negative records in reputation documents, maintaining a stable reputation. It ranks 16th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting high application attention. There is no historical record of enrollment gaps. It has 8 A- or above disciplines including Chemistry A, Mechanical Engineering A, Business Administration A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Electrical Engineering A-, and Control Science and Engineering A-, highlighting strong engineering capabilities that attract science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social heat for engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Artificial Intelligence continues to rise. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in the province is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Hunan University is located in Changsha City, in the Central China region, and Shaanxi examinees have a high recognition of central 985 universities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend in rankings, the significant increase in Physics Category examinees in 2026 (+19.7%), the university's high Douyin heat, and the attractiveness of its strong engineering disciplines, despite the 13.1% enrollment expansion, competitive pressure is still expected to rise. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to continue shifting backward from the 2025 baseline of 8582. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9286, with a range of 8786–9786.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 9286, with a range of 8786–9786. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (8786) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, and Artificial Intelligence. Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 9286) are advised to primarily consider Tier 2 majors like Mathematics, Intelligent Manufacturing, and Communication. Candidates near the upper limit of the range (9786) are advised to use Tier 3 majors such as Materials, Chemistry, and Civil Engineering as safety options, while also considering economics and management majors like Actuarial Science and Accounting.
